title: CKD — implied, overclaim, not-supported
notes: Synthetic; controlled ground truth. VERIFY before publishing.
manuscript: At week 52, the agent slowed the decline in eGFR compared with placebo.1 The agent was renoprotective across all stages of chronic kidney disease.1 The agent reduced cardiovascular mortality.2

goldClaims.originalText: At week 52, the agent slowed the decline in eGFR compared with placebo.1
goldClaims.text: At week 52, the agent slowed the decline in eGFR compared with placebo

goldClaims.originalText: The agent was renoprotective across all stages of chronic kidney disease.1
goldClaims.text: The agent was renoprotective across all stages of chronic kidney disease

1.name: CKD-PROTECT table (Ndiaye 2024)
1.text: Table 1. Annual eGFR slope (mL/min/1.73m2): agent -2.1, placebo -3.9. Subgroup analyses were limited to patients in CKD stages 3 and 4.

2.name: CKD-PROTECT endpoints
2.text: Cardiovascular mortality was not a pre-specified endpoint and was not analysed in this study.

goldVerdicts.claimText: At week 52, the agent slowed the decline in eGFR compared with placebo
goldVerdicts.rationale: Support is a data table (eGFR slope -2.1 vs -3.9) with no narrative sentence stating it (rule 5).

goldVerdicts.claimText: The agent was renoprotective across all stages of chronic kidney disease
goldVerdicts.rationale: Ref limits analysis to CKD stages 3-4; claim broadens to all stages (rule 3).
Ref says CV mortality was not analysed — silent (rule 2).
